Armada engineering guardrails for LLM agents:

- Keep changes minimal and scoped to the assigned bead.
- Preserve existing behavior unless acceptance criteria require change.
- For any mutation with an Action ID, internal shell triggers MUST execute via action path; do not bypass with direct state mutation.
- Use Beads (bd) for all tracking; link discovered work with discovered-from dependencies.
- Run required validation gates and report exact command outcomes.
